statement.markdown: Given an array of integers, implement a function to check if it is possible to form pairs such that the sum of each pair is even. The function should return `true` if it is possible to form pairs and `false` otherwise. Note that each element can only be used once in the pairs.
statement.outputFormat: A boolean value indicating whether it is possible to form pairs with even sum
statement.notes: The function should check if it is possible to form pairs using all elements in the array.

examples.explanation: It is not possible to form pairs with even sum using all elements in the array.
It is possible to form pairs with even sum using all elements in the array.

hints.text: First hint text: Think about how to categorize the elements in the array.
